zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Henry Fowler of Berkshire於大約1380年出生在英國奧可福爾瓦爾 本 懷特 霍爾時，他的父親John Fowler IV31歲，母親Margaret Loveday29歲。他於大約1400年與Elizabeth de Barton在英國英格蘭波克夏史利文哈姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1450年在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾霍蘭 芬 邱奇享年72歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Henry Fowler of Berkshire于大约1380年出生在英国奧可福爾瓦爾 本 懷特 霍爾时，他的父亲John Fowler IV31岁，母亲Margaret Loveday29岁。他于大约1400年与Elizabeth de Barton在英国英格兰波克夏史利文哈姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1450年在英国英格兰林可爾史爾霍蘭 芬 邱奇享年72岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Fowler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a fowler, a hunter or trapper of wild birds (a common medieval occupation), from Middle English fogheler, fugheler (Old English fugelere, a derivative of fugol ‘bird’).

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Henry Fowler of Berkshire was born about 1380, in Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, England, his father, John Fowler IV, was 31 and his mother, Margaret Loveday, was 29. He married Elizabeth de Barton about 1400, in Shrivenham, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died about 1450, in Holland Fen Church, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 72, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Henry Fowler of Berkshire est né environ 1380, à Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, John Fowler IV, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Margaret Loveday, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth de Barton environ 1400, à Shrivenham, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1450, à Holland Fen Church, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Henry Fowler of Berkshire um 1380 in Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Fowler IV 31 und seine Mutter Margaret Loveday 29. Er hat um 1400 in Shrivenham, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth de Barton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1450 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Holland Fen Church, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry Fowler of Berkshire è nato il circa 1380 nel Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, England, il suo padre, John Fowler IV, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Loveday, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth de Barton circa 1400, nel Shrivenham, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1450, nel Holland Fen Church, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Henry Fowler of Berkshireが約1380年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアベル オフ ウィト ホールゼで生まれた時，父John Fowler IVは31歳，母Margaret Lovedayは29歳であった。約1400年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアシュリベンハムでElizabeth de Bartonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1450年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアホーランド フン チャーチで72歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Henry Fowler of Berkshire(이)가 대략 1380년 영국 스퍼드실르 발 프 휘트 호르스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Fowler IV(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Loveday(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1400년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 슈라이븐함에서 Elizabeth de Barton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1450년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 홀랜드 펜 c후르치에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry Fowler of Berkshire nasceu aproximadamente 1380, em Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Fowler IV, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Loveday, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth de Barton aproximadamente 1400, em Shrivenham, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1450, em Holland Fen Church, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra.

ru.< Boston Borough, Holland Fen, Lincolnsh: холланд фен чурч, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Henry Fowler of Berkshire родился около 1380 г. в местности веил оф уит хаурс, оксфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Fowler IV было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Loveday, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth de Barton около 1400 г. в местности шривенам, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер около 1450 г. в местности холланд фен чурч, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Henry Fowler of Berkshire nació aproximadamente 1380, en Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Fowler IV, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Margaret Loveday, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Elizabeth de Barton aproximadamente 1400, en Shrivenham, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1450, en Holland Fen Church, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra.
